title: Login with valid credentials lands on dashboard
description: Verifies a Super Admin can log in and reach the protected dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Login with invalid password shows authentication error
description: Verifies invalid credentials prevent login and display an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill valid@email.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Dashboard shows KPI stats and can navigate to MockBook management
description: Verifies the dashboard primary KPI content loads and MockBook section is reachable via UI navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Verify MockBook management content is displayed

title: Unauthenticated visit to dashboard redirects to login
description: Verifies protected dashboard route is not accessible without authentication.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the user is on the login page

title: MockBook management loads KPI stats and lists series/live tests
description: Verifies the MockBook management page loads its primary content including KPI stats and data sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Verify KPI stats for platform tests, series, attempts, and students are displayed
Verify test series and live tests are displayed

title: Filter test series by name reduces results
description: Verifies filtering by name updates the visible test series list based on typed criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Fill Sample into the test series name filter field
Verify only test series matching Sample are displayed

title: Filter test series by category and status updates results
description: Verifies category and status filters can be applied to change the visible set of test series.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Select a category in the category filter
Select a status in the status filter
Verify the test series list reflects the selected category and status filters

title: Selecting a live test opens its details view
description: Verifies a live test can be selected and its details are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Click a live test in the live tests list
Verify live test details are displayed

title: Navigate from MockBook management to category management
description: Verifies category management is reachable from the MockBook management page via UI navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Click the navigation option to open category management
Verify category management content is displayed

title: No-match filters show empty state with guidance
description: Verifies an empty-state appears when filters produce no matching test series.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation option to open MockBook management
Fill zz-no-matches-12345 into the test series name filter field
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify suggestions to broaden or clear filters are visible

title: Category Management: create a new category and see it in the list
description: Creates a new category from the category management page and verifies it appears in the category list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for MockBook categories
Fill valid details for a new category using the name Category Auto 001
Save the new category
Verify the category list contains Category Auto 001

title: Category Management: validation for empty category details
description: Attempts to save a category with missing required information and verifies a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for MockBook categories
Clear required category input fields so they are empty
Attempt to save the new category
Verify a validation error is visible with guidance to fix the input

title: Category Management: categories page loads primary content
description: Verifies the category management page loads and displays the existing categories list with counts or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for MockBook categories
Verify the categories list is displayed or an empty state is visible

title: Category Management: prevent duplicate save via rapid repeat submit
description: Submits the create category form twice quickly and verifies only one new list entry is created for the submitted name.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for MockBook categories
Fill valid details for a new category using the name Category Auto 002
Click save twice quickly
Verify the category list contains a single entry for Category Auto 002

title: Category Management: cancel/abandon new category entry does not add to list
description: Starts entering a new category but does not save, and verifies it is not added to the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item for MockBook categories
Fill valid details for a new category using the name Category Auto 003
Click away from the form without saving
Refresh the page
Verify the category list does not contain Category Auto 003

title: Create Test Series: create a new test series and confirm it appears in the series list
description: Creates a new test series with required fields and verifies it appears in the MockBook series list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to create a new MockBook test series
Fill in the test series title with Series Auto 001
Add at least one valid section
Fill a valid schedule for the test series
Select a valid visibility setting
Configure a valid basic pricing setting if available
Save the test series
Click the navigation item for MockBook management
Verify the test series list contains Series Auto 001

title: Create Test Series: validation when required field is missing
description: Attempts to save a test series while omitting a required field and verifies a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to create a new MockBook test series
Leave at least one required field empty such as the title or schedule
Attempt to save the test series
Verify a validation error is visible describing the missing required information

title: Create Test Series: create page loads primary content
description: Verifies the create test series page loads and shows the form for configuring test series details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create
Verify the test series creation form is displayed

title: Create Test Series: schedule input enforces validity
description: Enters an invalid schedule configuration and verifies the UI blocks saving with a schedule validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create
Fill in the test series title with Series Auto 002
Add at least one valid section
Fill an invalid schedule configuration such as an end time earlier than the start time
Attempt to save the test series
Verify a schedule validation error is visible

title: Create Test Series: visibility affects available pricing options
description: Selects a visibility setting that changes pricing applicability and verifies pricing controls update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mockbook/test-series/create
Select a visibility setting that should disable or hide pricing
Verify pricing configuration controls are disabled or hidden when pricing is not applicable
